title: Beef and Mushroom Stir Fry
description: A classic beef stir fry recipe with the addition of earthy mushrooms, served with a side of steamed vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir in the soy sauce, salt, and black pepper.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the beef is coated in the sauce.
Serve the beef and mushroom stir fry hot, garnished with chopped scallions.
Serve with a side of steamed vegetables, such as broccoli or carrots.
